metadata.title: PolicyEvaluation — diff evaluation result against CIM thresholds

description: Result of evaluating a diff against CIM policy thresholds (src/body/services/cim/models.py). Pydantic BaseModel. findings carries list[CheckResult] — CheckResult is the governed CIM engine output (governed by both Finding.json and CheckResult.json). has_blocking and exit_code are @property derived values, not declared fields. NOTE: counter fields cover BLOCK/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW but not INFO — info_count is absent, so INFO findings from CheckResult.severity are silently omitted from the aggregate. exit_code returns magic numbers (10/2/0) not enumerated as constants. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

findings.description: List of CheckResult — findings from CIM engine evaluation. Governed by CheckResult contract. Default empty list.

blocking_count.description: Count of BLOCK severity findings. Default 0.

high_count.description: Count of HIGH severity findings. Default 0.

medium_count.description: Count of MEDIUM severity findings. Default 0.

low_count.description: Count of LOW severity findings. Default 0. NOTE: info_count is absent — INFO findings are silently excluded from this aggregate.
